<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\Constraint; use DateTimeImmutable; use DateTimeInterface; use Lcobucci\JWT\Signer; use Lcobucci\JWT\Token; use Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\ConstraintViolation; use Lcobucci\JWT\Validation\SignedWith as SignedWithInterface; use Psr\Clock\ClockInterface; final class SignedWithUntilDate implements SignedWithInterface { private readonly SignedWith $verifySignature; private readonly ClockInterface $clock; public function __construct( Signer $signer, Signer\Key $key, private readonly DateTimeImmutable $validUntil, ?ClockInterface $clock = null, ) { $this->verifySignature = new SignedWith($signer, $key); $this->clock = $clock ?? new class () implements ClockInterface { public function now(): DateTimeImmutable { return new DateTimeImmutable(); } }; } public function assert(Token $token): void { if ($this->validUntil < $this->clock->now()) { throw ConstraintViolation::error( 'This constraint was only usable until ' . $this->validUntil->format(DateTimeInterface::RFC3339), $this, ); } $this->verifySignature->assert($token); } }
